description: Default 'taste sources' for Step 0 auto-seed: the harness pulls its 5 ceiling references FROM these top sources (scoped WebSearch) instead of a generic award search — so the benchmark is a curated, opinionated ceiling, not the average. These set HOW HIGH to aim (quality), NOT one fixed look — the list is deliberately diverse, and per-task variation still comes from the constraint deck + the CTO novelty gate.
priority: Seeder resolves taste sources in this order: context.json.taste_sources (this task) > ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/taste-sources.json (the user's saved personal list) > this built-in default.
usage: For each source, WebSearch its `search` template with <主題> replaced by the task topic; gather candidates across sources; pick 5 that are highest-quality AND stylistically different from each other. Sources that are video/IG accounts (can't screenshot): use their portfolio site or write-ups instead, or treat the name as a style anchor.

sources.name: Awwwards — Site of the Day
sources.search: awwwards site of the day <主題>

sources.name: Active Theory
sources.search: Active Theory <主題> case study site
